name: org-health-diagnostic
description: > Cross-functional organizational health check combining signals from all C-suite roles. Scores 8 dimensions on a traffic-light scale with drill-down recommendations and cascade analysis. Use when assessing overall company health, preparing for board reviews, identifying at-risk functions, diagnosing cross-functional problems, or when user mentions org health, health check, health dashboard, company health, functional health, or health assessment.
author: borghei
